nasb.text: And this is clearer still, if another priest arises according to the likeness of Melchizedek,

esv.text: This becomes even more evident when another priest arises in the likeness of Melchizedek,

cnv.text: 如果有另一位像麥基洗德那樣的祭司興起來，那麼，這裡所說的就更明顯了。

csbs.text: 如果照着麦基洗德的相同样式另有一位祭司兴起来，那么，这件事就更加明显了。
